creator: McGraw-Hill Book Co.
description: Harvest of Shame Reel 1 Reel 2 available here Shows the degradation and exploitation of millions of migratory farm workers in the United States. Spokesmen for the groups present their views, both for and against the use of migratory workers under the conditions seen.
